title: Admin adds a quote
summary: From /admin, the admin clicks 'Add quote' to load /admin/add. The page renders a form with a CategoryPicker (free-text input + clickable existing-category chips). On submit, a Server Action inserts the row and revalidates both / and /admin so the new quote shows up everywhere.

steps.label: GET /admin/add
steps.note: Edge gate runs first — see proxy-auth-gate.

steps.label: pass through
steps.note: Cookie present → request forwarded to the page.

steps.label: requireAdmin()
steps.note: Defense-in-depth: page also checks the cookie itself in case the proxy is bypassed.

steps.label: findMany({ distinct: ['category'] })
steps.note: Fetched to populate the CategoryPicker chips.

steps.label: render form
steps.note: SubmitButton uses useFormStatus for the 'Saving…' state.

steps.label: POST form (Server Action)
steps.note: form action={addQuote} — runs on the server, no client JS roundtrip.

steps.label: validate text + category
steps.note: Silent no-op if either is empty after trim. Author and source are optional and saved as null when blank.

steps.label: revalidatePath('/'), revalidatePath('/admin')
steps.note: Drops cached HTML for both pages so the new quote appears on next render.

steps.label: redirect → /admin
steps.note: Server Action redirect bounces back to the list view.
